mockTourPackagesDatabase.title: Gangtok & Darjeeling Premium
mockTourPackagesDatabase.shortDescription: Experience the charming colonial hill station of Darjeeling and the vibrant capital city Gangtok.
mockTourPackagesDatabase.highlights: Sunrise at Tiger Hill, Visit to Ghoom Monastery, Batasia Loop, Ropeway ride in Gangtok, Flower exhibition center.

itinerary.description: Arrive at Bagdogra Airport or NJP Railway Station. Meet our representative and transfer to Gangtok. Check in to your hotel and spend the evening at leisure exploring MG Marg.

sightseeingPoints.name: MG Marg
sightseeingPoints.description: Walk through the clean, litter-free pedestrian shopping street of Gangtok.

itinerary.description: After breakfast, proceed for a full day sightseeing tour of Gangtok covering Rumtek Monastery, Tashi View Point, Ganesh Tok, and Enchey Monastery.

sightseeingPoints.name: Rumtek Monastery
sightseeingPoints.description: One of the largest and most significant monasteries in Sikkim, showcasing rare Tibetan Buddhist art.

sightseeingPoints.name: Tashi View Point
sightseeingPoints.description: Offers sweeping views of Kanchenjunga snow peaks on a clear day.

itinerary.description: Excursion to Tsomgo Lake and Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir. Enjoy the snow and high altitude views.

sightseeingPoints.name: Tsomgo Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: A sacred, high-altitude glacial lake surrounded by steep, snow-capped mountains.

itinerary.description: Transfer to Darjeeling, the land of tea gardens. Check in to your premium hotel and enjoy a scenic sunset over the mountains.

sightseeingPoints.name: Darjeeling Tea Garden View
sightseeingPoints.description: Panoramic views of verdant hills covered with lush green tea bushes.

itinerary.description: Early morning visit to Tiger Hill for sunrise. On the way back, visit Ghoom Monastery and Batasia Loop. After breakfast, visit Himalayan Mountaineering Institute (HMI) and Zoo.

sightseeingPoints.name: Tiger Hill Sunrise
sightseeingPoints.description: Spectacular view of sunrise lighting up Mt. Kanchenjunga in gold.

sightseeingPoints.name: Batasia Loop
sightseeingPoints.description: A spiral railway loop offering panoramic views of Darjeeling town and Kanchenjunga.

itinerary.description: After breakfast, check out from the hotel and transfer to NJP Railway Station or Bagdogra Airport for your onward journey.

mockTourPackagesDatabase.remarks: Initial system setup. Seeded package PKG-1001

mockTourPackagesDatabase.title: North Sikkim Explorer Pack
mockTourPackagesDatabase.shortDescription: Embark on a thrilling journey through North Sikkim, visiting high altitude lakes and flower valleys.
mockTourPackagesDatabase.highlights: Excursion to Gurudongmar Lake, Yumthang Valley of Flowers, Lachung Monastery, Zero Point snow fields.

itinerary.description: Start early morning from Gangtok. Travel along the dramatic Teesta River, passing waterfalls like Bhim Nala. Arrive at the remote village Lachen (8,800 ft).

sightseeingPoints.name: Teesta River View
sightseeingPoints.description: Scenic points along the rushing Teesta river flowing through deep gorges.

itinerary.description: Drive at 4 AM to Gurudongmar Lake (17,800 ft), one of the highest lakes in the world. Spend some time absorbing the pristine white landscape. Return for lunch, then transfer to Lachung.

sightseeingPoints.name: Gurudongmar Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: Breathtakingly beautiful sacred lake surrounded by snow-clad mountains.

itinerary.description: Visit Yumthang Valley, also known as the Valley of Flowers. Optional excursion to Zero Point (Yumesamdong) at extra cost. Return to Lachung for overnight stay.

sightseeingPoints.name: Yumthang Valley
sightseeingPoints.description: A alpine meadow filled with hot springs, yaks, and beautiful rhododendron trees.

itinerary.description: Check out from Lachung. Return drive to Gangtok, stopping by beautiful viewpoints. Check in to your Gangtok hotel by evening.
Departure from Gangtok hotel. Head home with adventurous memories.

mockTourPackagesDatabase.remarks: Initial system setup. Seeded package PKG-1002

mockTourPackagesDatabase.title: Pelling Budget Stay
mockTourPackagesDatabase.shortDescription: Explore the historical monuments, skywalks, and breathtaking Kanchenjunga views of West Sikkim.
mockTourPackagesDatabase.highlights: Pelling Skywalk, Khecheopalri Lake, Rabdentse Ruins, Tathagata Sal (Buddha Park) in Ravangla.

itinerary.description: Transfer from NJP/Bagdogra to Pelling. Enjoy the changing landscapes from tea plains to high hills. Check in and relax.
Full day local sightseeing in Pelling. Visit India’s first Glass Skywalk, Chenrezig Statue, Rimbi Waterfalls, Orange Garden, and the sacred Khecheopalri Lake.

sightseeingPoints.name: Pelling Skywalk
sightseeingPoints.description: A thrilling glass-floor walk looking down at the valley, facing the massive statue of Chenrezig.

sightseeingPoints.name: Khecheopalri Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: Sacred wishing lake where it is said birds clean any leaves that fall on the surface.

itinerary.description: Travel to Ravangla. Visit the magnificent Buddha Park featuring a 130-foot tall Buddha statue. Return to Pelling, visiting Rabdentse Ruins on the way.

sightseeingPoints.name: Buddha Park Ravangla
sightseeingPoints.description: A beautifully landscaped park containing a magnificent monument towering over the region.

sightseeingPoints.name: Rabdentse Ruins
sightseeingPoints.description: The historic second capital of the former Kingdom of Sikkim, surrounded by forest walking trails.

itinerary.description: After breakfast, check out and drive back to Bagdogra/NJP for departure.

mockTourPackagesDatabase.remarks: Initial system setup. Seeded package PKG-1003

mockTourPackagesDatabase.title: Historical Silk Route Luxury Tour
mockTourPackagesDatabase.shortDescription: Step back in time along the ancient trade route connecting India and Tibet, staying in local homestays.
mockTourPackagesDatabase.highlights: Thambi View Point zig-zag road, Kupup Lake (Elephant Lake), Gnathang Valley snow peaks, Aritar Lake.

itinerary.description: Transfer from Siliguri to Aritar. Visit Lampokhari (Aritar Lake), one of the oldest natural lakes in Sikkim where boating is available.

sightseeingPoints.name: Aritar Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: Emerald green emerald lake surrounded by pine forests, great for peaceful walks.

itinerary.description: Obtain permits and drive to Zuluk, a small hamlet that once served as a transit point on the Silk Route. Explore the village on foot.

sightseeingPoints.name: Zuluk Village
sightseeingPoints.description: A tiny military-adjacent village perched on high hills with beautiful sunset views.

itinerary.description: Wake up early to visit Thambi View Point to witness sunrise over the zig-zag curves of Zuluk road. Proceed to Kupup Lake and Baba Mandir.

sightseeingPoints.name: Thambi View Point
sightseeingPoints.description: Famous viewpoint showing the iconic 32 hair-pin bends of the Silk Route winding down the mountain.

sightseeingPoints.name: Kupup Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: A high altitude lake resembling an elephant shape, surrounded by frozen valleys.

itinerary.description: Drive down from Zuluk to Aritar, enjoying the scenic descent. Relax at the homestay and experience local Sikkimese hospitality and food.
Transfer back to Siliguri for your departure.

itinerary.description: Arrive in NJP and transfer to Gangtok. Spend the evening walking around MG Marg.
Full day excursion to Tsomgo Lake and Baba Mandir. If permission is granted, visit Nathu La Pass (Indo-China border).

sightseeingPoints.name: Tsomgo Glacial Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: Stunning oval glacial lake sacred to both Buddhists and Hindus.

itinerary.description: Quick morning sightseeing of Gangtok ropeway, then drive back to NJP.

mockTourPackagesDatabase.shortDescription: Explore the historical monuments, skywalks, and breathtaking Kanchenjunga views of West Sikkim.
mockTourPackagesDatabase.highlights: Pelling Skywalk, Khecheopalri Lake, Rabdentse Ruins, Tathagata Sal (Buddha Park) in Ravangla.

itinerary.description: Transfer from NJP/Bagdogra to Pelling. Enjoy the changing landscapes from tea plains to high hills. Check in and relax.
Full day local sightseeing in Pelling. Visit India’s first Glass Skywalk, Chenrezig Statue, Rimbi Waterfalls, Orange Garden, and the sacred Khecheopalri Lake.

sightseeingPoints.name: Pelling Skywalk
sightseeingPoints.description: A thrilling glass-floor walk looking down at the valley, facing the massive statue of Chenrezig.

sightseeingPoints.name: Khecheopalri Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: Sacred wishing lake where it is said birds clean any leaves that fall on the surface.

itinerary.description: Travel to Ravangla. Visit the magnificent Buddha Park featuring a 130-foot tall Buddha statue. Return to Pelling, visiting Rabdentse Ruins on the way.

sightseeingPoints.name: Buddha Park Ravangla
sightseeingPoints.description: A beautifully landscaped park containing a magnificent monument towering over the region.

sightseeingPoints.name: Rabdentse Ruins
sightseeingPoints.description: The historic second capital of the former Kingdom of Sikkim, surrounded by forest walking trails.

itinerary.description: After breakfast, check out and drive back to Bagdogra/NJP for departure.

mockTourPackagesDatabase.remarks: Initial system setup. Seeded package PKG-1018

mockTourPackagesDatabase.title: Historical Silk Route Family Package
mockTourPackagesDatabase.shortDescription: Step back in time along the ancient trade route connecting India and Tibet, staying in local homestays.
mockTourPackagesDatabase.highlights: Thambi View Point zig-zag road, Kupup Lake (Elephant Lake), Gnathang Valley snow peaks, Aritar Lake.

itinerary.description: Transfer from Siliguri to Aritar. Visit Lampokhari (Aritar Lake), one of the oldest natural lakes in Sikkim where boating is available.

sightseeingPoints.name: Aritar Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: Emerald green emerald lake surrounded by pine forests, great for peaceful walks.

itinerary.description: Obtain permits and drive to Zuluk, a small hamlet that once served as a transit point on the Silk Route. Explore the village on foot.

sightseeingPoints.name: Zuluk Village
sightseeingPoints.description: A tiny military-adjacent village perched on high hills with beautiful sunset views.

itinerary.description: Wake up early to visit Thambi View Point to witness sunrise over the zig-zag curves of Zuluk road. Proceed to Kupup Lake and Baba Mandir.

sightseeingPoints.name: Thambi View Point
sightseeingPoints.description: Famous viewpoint showing the iconic 32 hair-pin bends of the Silk Route winding down the mountain.

sightseeingPoints.name: Kupup Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: A high altitude lake resembling an elephant shape, surrounded by frozen valleys.

itinerary.description: Drive down from Zuluk to Aritar, enjoying the scenic descent. Relax at the homestay and experience local Sikkimese hospitality and food.
Transfer back to Siliguri for your departure.

itinerary.description: Quick morning sightseeing of Gangtok ropeway, then drive back to NJP.

mockTourPackagesDatabase.remarks: Initial system setup. Seeded package PKG-1020

mockTourPackagesDatabase.title: Gangtok & Darjeeling Premium
mockTourPackagesDatabase.shortDescription: Experience the charming colonial hill station of Darjeeling and the vibrant capital city Gangtok.
mockTourPackagesDatabase.highlights: Sunrise at Tiger Hill, Visit to Ghoom Monastery, Batasia Loop, Ropeway ride in Gangtok, Flower exhibition center.

itinerary.description: Arrive at Bagdogra Airport or NJP Railway Station. Meet our representative and transfer to Gangtok. Check in to your hotel and spend the evening at leisure exploring MG Marg.

sightseeingPoints.name: MG Marg
sightseeingPoints.description: Walk through the clean, litter-free pedestrian shopping street of Gangtok.

itinerary.description: After breakfast, proceed for a full day sightseeing tour of Gangtok covering Rumtek Monastery, Tashi View Point, Ganesh Tok, and Enchey Monastery.

sightseeingPoints.name: Rumtek Monastery
sightseeingPoints.description: One of the largest and most significant monasteries in Sikkim, showcasing rare Tibetan Buddhist art.

sightseeingPoints.name: Tashi View Point
sightseeingPoints.description: Offers sweeping views of Kanchenjunga snow peaks on a clear day.

itinerary.description: Excursion to Tsomgo Lake and Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir. Enjoy the snow and high altitude views.

sightseeingPoints.name: Tsomgo Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: A sacred, high-altitude glacial lake surrounded by steep, snow-capped mountains.

itinerary.description: Transfer to Darjeeling, the land of tea gardens. Check in to your premium hotel and enjoy a scenic sunset over the mountains.

sightseeingPoints.name: Darjeeling Tea Garden View
sightseeingPoints.description: Panoramic views of verdant hills covered with lush green tea bushes.

itinerary.description: Early morning visit to Tiger Hill for sunrise. On the way back, visit Ghoom Monastery and Batasia Loop. After breakfast, visit Himalayan Mountaineering Institute (HMI) and Zoo.

sightseeingPoints.name: Tiger Hill Sunrise
sightseeingPoints.description: Spectacular view of sunrise lighting up Mt. Kanchenjunga in gold.

sightseeingPoints.name: Batasia Loop
sightseeingPoints.description: A spiral railway loop offering panoramic views of Darjeeling town and Kanchenjunga.

itinerary.description: After breakfast, check out from the hotel and transfer to NJP Railway Station or Bagdogra Airport for your onward journey.

mockTourPackagesDatabase.title: North Sikkim Explorer Pack
mockTourPackagesDatabase.shortDescription: Embark on a thrilling journey through North Sikkim, visiting high altitude lakes and flower valleys.
mockTourPackagesDatabase.highlights: Excursion to Gurudongmar Lake, Yumthang Valley of Flowers, Lachung Monastery, Zero Point snow fields.

itinerary.description: Start early morning from Gangtok. Travel along the dramatic Teesta River, passing waterfalls like Bhim Nala. Arrive at the remote village Lachen (8,800 ft).

sightseeingPoints.name: Teesta River View
sightseeingPoints.description: Scenic points along the rushing Teesta river flowing through deep gorges.

itinerary.description: Drive at 4 AM to Gurudongmar Lake (17,800 ft), one of the highest lakes in the world. Spend some time absorbing the pristine white landscape. Return for lunch, then transfer to Lachung.

sightseeingPoints.name: Gurudongmar Lake
sightseeingPoints.description: Breathtakingly beautiful sacred lake surrounded by snow-clad mountains.

itinerary.description: Visit Yumthang Valley, also known as the Valley of Flowers. Optional excursion to Zero Point (Yumesamdong) at extra cost. Return to Lachung for overnight stay.

sightseeingPoints.name: Yumthang Valley
sightseeingPoints.description: A alpine meadow filled with hot springs, yaks, and beautiful rhododendron trees.

itinerary.description: Check out from Lachung. Return drive to Gangtok, stopping by beautiful viewpoints. Check in to your Gangtok hotel by evening.
Departure from Gangtok hotel. Head home with adventurous memories.
